description: Reusable metadata templates for Day 3 page standardization.

hub.title: Best {level2_name} Tools ({year}) - AI Tool Lab
hub.description: Compare top {level2_name} tools with score-based ranking, practical recommendations, and direct links. Updated for {year}.
hub.og_description: Objective ranking for {level2_name}: data-driven scores, quick picks, and official links.

compare.title: {top_tool_1} vs {top_tool_2} for {level2_name} - Which One Is Better?
compare.description: Head-to-head comparison for {level2_name}: {top_tool_1} vs {top_tool_2} across quality, speed, free value, and automation.
compare.og_description: A practical side-by-side comparison with scoring logic and use-case recommendations.

usecase.title: Best {level2_name} for {seed_keyword} ({year})
usecase.description: Use-case focused picks for {level2_name}. See ranked options, strengths, and when to use each tool.
usecase.og_description: Scenario-based recommendations with clear scoring and quick official links.

free.title: Free {level2_name} Tools ({year}) - Best Picks
free.description: Free-first ranking for {level2_name} tools with notes on limits, quality, and upgrade trade-offs.
free.og_description: Find the best free options first, then compare paid upgrades when needed.

automation.title: Best {level2_name} for Automation ({year})
automation.description: Automation-focused ranking for {level2_name}, emphasizing API support, batch workflow, and scalability.
automation.og_description: Choose tools for workflow automation with score-backed recommendations.
